remediationSteps.summary: Delete the test cache and retry the test.
remediationSteps.details:
Delete the cached .cache-lock/<spec-file>.cache.js entry for this test so page.ai recalculates selectors against the live DOM,
then rerun the automation to verify recovery.

remediationSteps.summary: Update selectors if the autonomous retry still fails.
remediationSteps.details: If cache invalidation and autonomous retry still fail, fall back to manually adjusting the selector strategy.

additionalDataRequests.description: Collect DOM snapshots or screenshots around the failing selector.

heuristics.notes: High confidence stale cache scenario detected (score: 0.65). Cache invalidation + autonomous retry strongly recommended. Selector failure occurred while executing page.ai steps. Deleting the cached tool calls enables a fresh autonomous attempt.
